scene.message: Nanjo: Ugh...{wait_fr:48}{nl} What's this gloomy haze?{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: It doesn't feel{nl} very cheerful here.{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: It's so dark...{nl} Ayase hates places like this!{waitkey}{ret}
...Alright, a straight!{waitkey}{ret}
Customer: You think we're
a gloomy bunch, huh?{waitkey}{clearbox}Yeah - our only salvation{nl} is Lady Harlem Queen!
{ret}
...Heh, full house!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: I wonder what the{nl} Harlem Queen is like?{waitkey}{ret}
{ret}
Mark: Sonomura...{wait_fr:48}{nl} This must be a shock...{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Guess Naito really{nl} was a nice guy.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: I think I see the{nl} cause of this gloomy haze.{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: The bond between{nl} a man and a woman...
Ayase: Kasai... that's{nl} a bold move she pulled!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Ayase wants{wait_fr:32}...
Ayase wants that mirror too~!{nl} Ayase'll make a harem too~!{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: Harlem Queen, huh?{nl} Heh, don't make me laugh.{waitkey}{ret}
